content.full_text:
March 20, 1991

Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J St., 8th Floor
Sacramento CA 95814

Re: Recipient committee bank accounts

What financial products may a recipient committee use to temporarily store unneeded funds? For instance, may funds be put into a certificate of deposit in order to earn a higher rate of interest than is available from a money market checking account? May a committee purchase U.S. Treasury instruments through a stock broker? Are corporate bonds acceptable investments if purchased through a broker? Do the funds have to be insured by an official government agency?

Thank you for your assistance.

Sincerely,

David Bauer
